item.description:
What's new in Sonault 1.1.0

  • Pasting a link now adds the download to the queue right away — no more waiting on a popup while the video details load.
  • The queue row fills in the title, channel, duration, and thumbnail on its own as they arrive.
  • Videos over the 10-minute limit now wait in the queue with a "Choose Section…" button, so you pick the part you want without holding up the rest of the queue.
